message:
fix(contracts): compute coverage using matching evidence ratio only

Coverage was computed as passed/total (including evidence for other
contracts). Now correctly computed as passed/matching (only evidence
targeting this contract). Update proptest to verify mismatched evidence
does not drag coverage below 1.0 when matching evidence all passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
